overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person vehicle journey through the industrial outskirts of Night City during dusk. The camera travels from a roadside dirt path, ascends an overpass ramp, and merges onto a multi-lane highway, passing under illuminated directional gantries.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway shoulder with illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: moving along the dirt shoulder parallel to the highway, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black van driving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the rocky hillside
tall electrical pylons with multiple high-tension cables
steep terrain with sparse vegetation and mounted billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dirt shoulder alongside a highway in an industrial outskirts area. Large illuminated billboards and power transmission towers dominate the background against a dusky sky. The camera moves forward parallel to the road where a black van travels ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass ramp with concrete walls

events.description: ascending ramp from ground level to elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: driving up the curving ramp to the overpass level, following the black van

notable_agents.action: black van ascending the ramp ahead

entered.detail: elevated highway ramp with concrete barriers and support columns
high-rise building with illuminated windows appearing on the right skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a curving ramp to an elevated overpass, transitioning from open sky to a partially covered concrete structure. A tall residential tower emerges on the right while the industrial billboards recede behind. The black van continues ahead on the ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overpass with concrete sound barriers

agents.ego_description: traveling along the elevated overpass following traffic, with tall concrete walls on the left

notable_agents.action: pickup truck driving ahead on the overpass

entered.detail: tall solid concrete wall lining the left side of the overpass

segments.scene_description: Traveling along the elevated overpass with concrete sound barriers on the left and the tall residential tower now prominent on the right. The pickup truck ahead maintains a steady pace as the camera follows along the enclosed highway section.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway intersection with merge point

events.description: sharp left turn merging from overpass onto main highway lanes
passing under large directional sign gantry

agents.ego_description: making a sharp left turn to merge from the overpass ramp onto the main highway

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure supporting directional road signs
concrete dividers with red and white striped warning patterns
illuminated advertisement screens visible again on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: Executing a sharp left turn to merge from the overpass onto the main highway. The scene opens up to full sky exposure as the camera passes under a large sign gantry. Roadside barriers line the right side while industrial billboards reappear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with overhead gantries approaching interchange

events.description: passing under Santo Domingo directional sign gantry

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway passing multiple vehicles and overhead sign structures

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: overhead sign structure displaying 'SANTO DOMINGO' direction with arrow
cluster of large industrial buildings with illuminated windows
rounded concrete industrial structure with green lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows high-speed travel along the main highway approaching an interchange. The camera passes under the Santo Domingo sign gantry while industrial complexes rise on the right. A dark sedan overtakes on the left as the journey continues toward the illuminated city structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dusty industrial roadside onto a high-speed urban highway under a dusky sky. It begins on a dirt shoulder parallel to the road, moving past towering power transmission lines and illuminated billboards while following a black van. As the camera ascends a curving ramp, the open horizon shifts into a partially covered concrete overpass, bringing a tall residential tower into prominent view on the right. The scene then transitions through a sharp left turn that merges the camera onto the main highway, opening the view back to the full sky as it passes under a large sign gantry. Finally, the perspective accelerates along the multi-lane road, passing under the Santo Domingo gantry and gliding past industrial complexes toward the illuminated structures of the city.
